dashboardPage.subtitle: Operational overview retrieved from Backend Dashboard API. Detailed revenue requires Order/Payment backend.
dashboardPage.summaryError: Failed to load dashboard summary from Backend API.
dashboardPage.chartRevenueDesc: Requires Order/Payment backend to show real data
dashboardPage.chartRevenueNoData: No monthly revenue data available since Order/Payment backend is not implemented.
dashboardPage.chartBranchNoData: No revenue data by branch available.
dashboardPage.chartProductDesc: Requires Order backend to compile best sellers
dashboardPage.chartProductNoData: No best selling product data available.
dashboardPage.chartCustomerDesc: Requires real report endpoint to plot customer growth

branchesPage.title: Branches
branchesPage.subtitle: Manage the active store locations in the Lowlands Coffee chain.

categoriesPage.subtitle: Set up product categorization list (Coffee, Tea, Pastry, etc.).

productsPage.subtitle: Set up beverage and pastry menus, pricing parameters for all stores.

toppingsPage.subtitle: Set up lists of jelly, boba, and heavy cream options accompanying drinks.

importNotesPage.title: Import Note Management
importNotesPage.subtitle: Record raw materials import information from suppliers into the stock of each store.
importNotesPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by note code, supplier, creator...
importNotesPage.toastNoSuppliers: Please add a Supplier before creating an import note!
importNotesPage.toastNoIngredients: Please add Ingredients before creating an import note!
importNotesPage.toastNoBranches: Cannot create import note because branches could not be loaded from Backend API.

ingredientsPage.title: Ingredient Management
ingredientsPage.subtitle: Set up categorization of beverage ingredients, dosages, and usage units in the system.
ingredientsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by ingredient name or code...

recipesPage.title: Recipe Management
recipesPage.subtitle: Define standard preparation recipes for each product size to automatically deduct raw material stock.
recipesPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by recipe name or code...

ordersPage.subtitle: Order management will be enabled when the Order backend is implemented.
ordersPage.placeholderDesc: This page no longer uses mockup orders or local state. When backend Order/Payment is ready, real-time list, details, and order state updates will be synced with real APIs.

customersPage.subtitle: Customer list retrieved from User API. Order history and total spent will be available when Order backend is implemented.

promotionsPage.subtitle: Promotion management will be enabled when the Promotion backend is implemented.
promotionsPage.placeholderDesc: This page no longer uses mockup promotions or local CRUD. POS and Admin will apply promotions only when the backend API functions as the source of truth.

reportsPage.subtitle: Detailed revenue reports will be enabled when Order/Payment backend and report endpoints are ready.
reportsPage.placeholderDesc: The reports page no longer uses mockup orders, mock branch revenue, or random data. When the backend provides a real report endpoint, revenue and payment charts will be integrated here.

stockPage.title: Stock Inventory & Adjustment
stockPage.subtitle: Monitor physical stock balances of ingredients across stores. Create stock adjustment notes.
stockPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by ingredient name, code, or store...
stockPage.toastNoBranches: Cannot adjust stock because branches could not be loaded from Backend API.

suppliersPage.title: Supplier List
suppliersPage.subtitle: Manage raw material distributors, supply agreements, and agency contact details.
suppliersPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, code, contact person...

deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
deleteEmployeeConfirm: Are you sure you want to terminate this employee?
deletePromotionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this promo code?

employeesPage.title: Employee Management
employeesPage.subtitle: Manage employee accounts and store assignments.
employeesPage.errorDelete: Could not delete employee account via API.
employeesPage.errorSave: Could not save employee account via API.
